kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are two additional overrides: any house where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0 should be set to "EVU", and any house where HOUSE_NUM1 is in the range 500 to 599 should also be set to "EVU".

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

Export the final result as a CSV file named "J09A" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Send the CSV to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR)
        FROM J09A_temp t2
        WHERE t2.HAUS = J09A_temp.HAUS
    ) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        d."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
        d.HAUS,
        d.ANLAGE,
        d.ME_MA_ID,
        d.EQUNR,
        d.HOUSE_NUM1,
        d.ENTSCHEIDUNG
    FROM J09A_temp d
    LEFT JOIN eabl e ON d.EQUNR = e.EQUNR
),
net AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS net_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS net_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS net_SURNAME,
        STREET AS net_STREET,
        STREETNO AS net_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS net_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS net_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS net_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS net_EMAIL
    FROM net_master
),
sales AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        TITLE AS sales_TITLE,
        FORENAME AS sales_FORENAME,
        SURNAME AS sales_SURNAME,
        STREET AS sales_STREET,
        STREETNO AS sales_STREETNO,
        POST_CODE1 AS sales_POST_CODE1,
        CITY1 AS sales_CITY1,
        CITY2 AS sales_CITY2,
        EMAIL AS sales_EMAIL
    FROM sales_master
)
SELECT
    b."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    b.HAUS,
    b.ANLAGE,
    b.ME_MA_ID,
    b.EQUNR,
    b.HOUSE_NUM1,
    b.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_TITLE ELSE n.net_TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_FORENAME ELSE n.net_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_SURNAME ELSE n.net_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREET ELSE n.net_STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_STREETNO ELSE n.net_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_POST_CODE1 ELSE n.net_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY1 ELSE n.net_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_CITY2 ELSE n.net_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.sales_EMAIL ELSE n.net_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN net n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales s ON b.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sqlite_command:
SELECT
    g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    d.HAUS,
    d.ANLAGE,
    d.ME_MA_ID,
    d.EQUNR,
    d.HOUSE_NUM1,
    d.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09A_temp d
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON d.ANLAGE = g.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON d.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON d.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
LIMIT 1;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
SELECT
    g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    d.HAUS,
    d.ANLAGE,
    d.ME_MA_ID,
    d.EQUNR,
    d.HOUSE_NUM1,
    d.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
    CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09A_temp d
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON d.ANLAGE = g.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON d.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON d.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sql_query:
SELECT
    "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
    HAUS,
    ANLAGE,
    ME_MA_ID,
    EQUNR,
    HOUSE_NUM1,
    ENTSCHEIDUNG,
    TITLE,
    FORENAME,
    SURNAME,
    STREET,
    STREETNO,
    POST_CODE1,
    CITY1,
    CITY2,
    EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched;

kwargs.content:
I’ve completed the requested process for tour J09A:

1. Created temporary table `J09A_temp` with all rows from `decision_table` where `TOUR` starts with `J09A`.
2. Added column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09A_temp`.
3. Classified each house (`HAUS`) as follows:
   - If `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.
   - If `HOUSE_NUM1` between 500 and 599 → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.
   - Otherwise, counted distinct `EQUNR` per `HAUS`:
     - If count < 3 → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`.
     - Else → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.

4. Enriched the data:
   - Joined with `eablg` on `ANLAGE = Installation` to get `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`.
   - Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`.
   - When both sales and net records exist for an EQUNR, the selected contact fields (TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL) all come from `sales_master` and the net values are not used.
   - When only net data exists, the net fields are used.

5. Exported the final result to CSV:
   - Filename: `J09A.csv`
   - Columns in the CSV (in this order):
     - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
     - `HAUS`
     - `ANLAGE`
     - `ME_MA_ID`
     - `EQUNR`
     - `HOUSE_NUM1`
     - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
     - `TITLE`
     - `FORENAME`
     - `SURNAME`
     - `STREET`
     - `STREETNO`
     - `POST_CODE1`
     - `CITY1`
     - `CITY2`
     - `EMAIL`

6. Sent the CSV as an email attachment to:
   - `meter.readings@evu.com`
   - Subject/body recorded in the process as a handoff from the Meter Reading Automation System.

7. Dropped the temporary table `J09A_temp` from the database.

If you’d like, I can also drop the intermediate `J09A_enriched` table to fully clean up.
